All checks pass. Here's what the fix does:

**The problem:** After Google OAuth callback, better-auth redirects to `APP_URL + callbackURL` which is `http://localhost:4010/`. In local dev, the API has no frontend assets, so it returns "Not found".

**The fix** (line 129-136 of `apps/api/src/index.ts`): When the SPA `index.html` fallback doesn't exist (local dev) and `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` differs from `APP_URL`, redirect unmatched routes to the frontend dev server. This mirrors the SPA fallback behavior that works in production тАФ instead of serving `index.html`, it redirects to wherever the frontend is running.

This only activates when:
- No static `index.html` exists (dev mode, not production)
- `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` is different from `APP_URL` (separate frontend server)

So your flow will now be: Google callback hits `:4010/api/auth/callback/google` тЖТ better-auth processes it, sets cookies, redirects to `http://localhost:4010/` тЖТ API redirects to `http://localhost:4011/` тЖТ frontend loads with the session cookie already set.

1тЖТ# ============================================================================
     2тЖТ# Rudel тАФ Environment Variables
     3тЖТ# ============================================================================
     4тЖТ# Copy this file to .env and fill in the values.
     5тЖТ# For local development with Docker (bun run dev:local), all defaults work
     6тЖТ# out of the box тАФ you only need to set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.
     7тЖТ# ============================================================================
     8тЖТ
     9тЖТ# --- Required ----------------------------------------------------------------
    10тЖТ
    11тЖТ# Postgres connection string (Neon in production, local Docker in dev)
    12тЖТPG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel
    13тЖТ
    14тЖТ# Auth secret used by better-auth for signing tokens/cookies.
    15тЖТ# Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32
    16тЖТBETTER_AUTH_SECRET=
    17тЖТ
    18тЖТ# --- ClickHouse ---------------------------------------------------------------
    19тЖТ# For local dev, the Docker container (bun run dev:local) provides ClickHouse.
    20тЖТ# For hosted ClickHouse, get credentials at https://obsessiondb.com
    21тЖТ
    22тЖТ# ClickHouse HTTP endpoint. Local Docker uses port 8123; production is behind
    23тЖТ# a reverse proxy on port 443 (https://...).
    24тЖТCLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123
    25тЖТ
    26тЖТ# ClickHouse credentials. The API accepts both CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME and
    27тЖТ# CLICKHOUSE_USER (prefers CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME). Local Docker default password
    28тЖТ# is "clickhouse".
    29тЖТCLICKHOUSE_USERNAME=default
    30тЖТCLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=
    31тЖТ
    32тЖТ# ClickHouse database name. Used by chkit tooling for schema migrations.
    33тЖТ# Not read by the API at runtime (hardcoded to "rudel" in queries).
    34тЖТ# CLICKHOUSE_DB=rudel
    35тЖТ
    36тЖТ# --- API Server ---------------------------------------------------------------
    37тЖТ
    38тЖТ# Base URL of the API server. Used as better-auth's baseURL and automatically
    39тЖТ# added to trusted origins. Default: http://localhost:4010
    40тЖТ# APP_URL=http://localhost:4010
    41тЖТ
    42тЖТ# CORS allowed origin. Requests with a different Origin header won't get CORS
    43тЖТ# headers. Default: http://localhost:4011
    44тЖТ# ALLOWED_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4011
    45тЖТ
    46тЖТ# Comma-separated list of trusted origins for better-auth CSRF protection.
    47тЖТ# APP_URL is automatically appended. Default: http://localhost:4011
    48тЖТ# TRUSTED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:4011
    49тЖТ
    50тЖТ# Server listen port. Default: 4010. Overridden to 3000 in the Docker image.
    51тЖТ# PORT=4010
    52тЖТ
    53тЖТ# Directory for static file serving (SPA). Relative to apps/api/.
    54тЖТ# In production, the web app is built and copied to apps/api/public/.
    55тЖТ# Default: public
    56тЖТ# STATIC_DIR=public
    57тЖТ
    58тЖТ# --- OAuth Providers (optional) -----------------------------------------------
    59тЖТ# Enable social login by providing OAuth credentials. If not set, only
    60тЖТ# email/password authentication is available.
    61тЖТ
    62тЖТ# Google OAuth
    63тЖТ# GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
    64тЖТ# GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
    65тЖТ
    66тЖТ# GitHub OAuth
    67тЖТ# GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
    68тЖТ# GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=
    69тЖТ
    70тЖТ# --- Integrations (optional) --------------------------------------------------
    71тЖТ
    72тЖТ# Slack incoming webhook URL. When set, sends a notification to the channel
    73тЖТ# on every new user signup.
    74тЖТ# SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/...

1тЖТ#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2тЖТset -e
     3тЖТ
     4тЖТ# 1. Start Postgres + ClickHouse (idempotent)
     5тЖТdocker compose up -d --wait
     6тЖТ
     7тЖТ# 2. Run Postgres migrations (idempotent тАФ skips already-applied)
     8тЖТPG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel \
     9тЖТ  bun run --cwd packages/sql-schema migrate
    10тЖТ
    11тЖТ# 3. Start API + Web in parallel with local env vars
    12тЖТexport PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel
    13тЖТexport BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=local-dev-secret-that-is-at-least-32-chars-long
    14тЖТexport CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123
    15тЖТexport REDACTED
    16тЖТexport APP_URL=http://localhost:4011
    17тЖТ
    18тЖТ# Run API and Web in parallel, kill both on Ctrl+C
    19тЖТbun --watch apps/api/src/index.ts &
    20тЖТAPI_PID=$!
    21тЖТbun run --cwd apps/web dev &
    22тЖТWEB_PID=$!
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТtrap "kill $API_PID $WEB_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT
    25тЖТwait
    26тЖТ

gh pr create --base main --title "fix: redirect to frontend dev server when processing OAuth callbacks" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
Fixes OAuth redirect flow in local development when the frontend and API run on separate ports. When `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` differs from `APP_URL` (e.g., frontend on :4011, API on :4010), unmatched non-API routes now redirect to the frontend instead of returning 404.

## Problem
During Google OAuth sign-in, better-auth was redirecting to `APP_URL/` (the API server) which has no SPA frontend in local dev, causing "Not found" errors instead of completing the auth flow.

## Solution
Added a redirect before the final 404 that sends unmatched routes to `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` when running in dev mode with separate frontend and API servers. This preserves the production behavior (serving `index.html`) while supporting local development with Vite on a different port.

ЁЯдЦ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

- Added a dev-mode redirect that routes unmatched non-API requests to `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` when it differs from `APP_URL` (separate frontend and API servers)
